name: Perch with Rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dry ingredients.
2. In a sauté pan, melt butter or margarine and sauté half of the minced garlic for 1 minute.
3. Dip perch in milk, then dredge in seasoned cornmeal.
4. Place perch in the sauté pan and cook until browned on both sides, about 3 minutes per side. Cook fillets in 2 batches, using remaining garlic to start second batch.
5. Serve with fresh lemons, green salad, and crusty bread.
